question_text: Read the source extract shown below. The extract most directly reflects which idea?

options.B: Territorial expansion as a national right

answer_key.explanation: The author argues that nations must acquire territory by strength, reflecting an expansionist worldview.
common_mistakes: Choosing pacifism despite the extract's emphasis on conquest.

visual.caption: Source extract for interpretation.
visual.altText: A three-line numbered source extract attributed to an unnamed political pamphlet, with each line on a separate row.

lines.text: The earth is not allotted to anyone, nor is it presented as a gift.
It is given to peoples who have the courage to take it,
and the strength to hold what they have taken.
